parents.subject: LU-19080 compat: match kernel shrinker protocol

commit.subject: LU-18207 ladvise: return -EOPNOTSUPP for unknown advice
commit.message:
LU-18207 ladvise: return -EOPNOTSUPP for unknown advice

Function ll_ladvise_sanity() should return -EOPNOTSUPP for
unknown advice type, as llapi_ladvise man page documents.

Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I519aa42c7eb513886c63bacfdf05ff87669bc5cb
